common.tagline: Train Your Brain, Lower Your Brain Age

hero.title: Discover Your Brain's True Age
hero.subtitle: Science-based brain training to sharpen memory, focus, and cognition

brainAge.title: Brain Age Assessment
brainAge.description: Measure your cognitive performance across 5 dimensions

games.title: Science-Based Games
games.description: 21 games designed by cognitive science principles

visualSearch.title: Visual Search
visualSearch.description: Hunt for hidden targets in a sea of distractors! This classic attention task challenges you to spot specific shapes or colors among visual clutter. As you progress, the task gets harder with more distractions and tighter time limits. Used in psychology labs worldwide to measure selective attention and visual processing speed.

digitSpan.title: Digit Span
digitSpan.description: Challenge your digital memory limits! A sequence of numbers flashes on screen — memorize and repeat it back perfectly. As you advance, sequences grow longer, pushing your working memory to its edge. This classic cognitive task is used in psychology labs worldwide to measure and train short-term memory capacity.

reactionTraining.title: Reaction Training
reactionTraining.description: Test your reflexes and reaction speed! Respond to visual cues as fast as possible — tap, click, or press the moment you see the target. Track your improvement over time as you shave milliseconds off your response. Used by athletes and gamers to train split-second decision making.

stroopChallenge.title: Stroop Challenge
stroopChallenge.description: Face the famous Stroop effect! You'll see color words printed in conflicting colors — your task is to name the ink color, not read the word. This cognitive conflict training strengthens your brain's ability to inhibit automatic responses and focus on relevant information. A cornerstone of executive function training.

spatialMemory.title: Spatial Memory
spatialMemory.description: Remember and recreate spatial patterns! A grid of tiles will flash briefly — memorize their positions and tap them back in the exact same locations. As levels progress, patterns become more complex and grids expand. This task trains your brain's spatial working memory, crucial for navigation and visual-spatial reasoning.

breathingFlow.title: Breathing Flow
breathingFlow.description: Calm your mind with guided breathing exercises! Follow the animated breathing guide — inhale, hold, exhale — synchronized with soothing visuals. This relaxation technique activates your parasympathetic nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety. Perfect for mindfulness practice and mental recovery between training sessions.

memoryMatrix.title: Memory Matrix
memoryMatrix.description: Test your visual memory with flashing patterns! A matrix of squares will light up in a sequence — watch carefully and repeat the pattern by tapping the squares in the same order. The challenge increases with longer sequences and larger grids. This task strengthens your visual-spatial sketchpad, a key component of working memory.

backwardDigitSpan.title: Backward Digit Span
backwardDigitSpan.description: Reverse the challenge! You'll hear a sequence of numbers — but this time, repeat them backwards. If you see 3-7-2, you respond 2-7-3. This advanced working memory task forces you to manipulate information mentally, not just store it. Used in cognitive psychology to measure central executive function and mental manipulation ability.

spatialSequence.title: Spatial Sequence
spatialSequence.description: Follow the sequence! Tiles will light up one by one in a specific order — your task is to repeat the exact sequence by tapping them in the same order. As you advance, sequences get longer and the grid expands. This task trains your sequential processing and spatial working memory, essential for tasks requiring step-by-step reasoning.

patternMatch.title: Pattern Match
patternMatch.description: Spot the difference! You'll see a pattern briefly, then it changes — can you identify what shifted? This task challenges your visual discrimination and attention to detail. As levels progress, changes become subtler and time limits tighter. Used in cognitive training to improve visual working memory and pattern recognition.

attentionSpan.title: Attention Span
attentionSpan.description: Sustain your focus! Watch for target stimuli appearing at random intervals — tap only when you see the target, ignore everything else. This sustained attention task measures your ability to maintain vigilance over time. As the task continues, maintaining focus becomes harder, training your brain's endurance for prolonged concentration.

eagleEye.title: Eagle Eye
eagleEye.description: Track the target like a hawk! A moving object will weave through distractors — keep your eyes on it and report its final position. This multiple object tracking task challenges your ability to maintain attention on moving targets while ignoring distractions. Used to train visual attention and tracking ability in athletes and professionals.

distractionFilter.title: Distraction Filter
distractionFilter.description: Block out the noise! A central target requires your attention, but distracting stimuli surround it — focus on the center and ignore the periphery. This task trains your ability to filter out irrelevant information and maintain focus on what matters. Essential for improving concentration in noisy environments.

splitFocus.title: Split Focus
splitFocus.description: Divide and conquer! Monitor two separate zones simultaneously — respond to targets appearing in either location. This divided attention task challenges your brain's ability to process multiple information streams at once. As difficulty increases, the demands on your attentional resources grow, training true multitasking ability.

clickHorizon.title: Click Horizon
clickHorizon.description: Quick reflexes required! Targets drift across the screen — tap them before they vanish off the edge. This task combines reaction speed with spatial tracking, challenging you to respond rapidly to moving stimuli. As levels progress, targets move faster and appear more frequently, pushing your reflexes to the limit.

towerOfLogic.title: Tower of Logic
towerOfLogic.description: Solve the classic Tower of Hanoi puzzle! Move the stack of disks from one peg to another, following the rules: only one disk at a time, and never place a larger disk on a smaller one. Plan your moves carefully to solve it in the minimum number of steps. This classic problem-solving task trains planning, foresight, and logical reasoning.

changeFlex.title: Change Flex
changeFlex.description: Adapt and switch! You'll alternate between different tasks or rules — respond according to the current rule, then quickly adapt when it changes. This cognitive flexibility task challenges your brain's ability to switch between mental sets. Essential for improving adaptability and reducing cognitive rigidity.

pathFinder.title: Path Finder
pathFinder.description: Navigate the maze! Find the correct path through increasingly complex mazes — plan your route, avoid dead ends, and reach the goal. This spatial reasoning task challenges your ability to mentally map environments and plan routes. As mazes grow more complex, your navigation skills will be pushed to their limits.

matrixReasoning.title: Matrix Reasoning
matrixReasoning.description: Complete the pattern! You'll see a matrix with a missing piece — identify the underlying rule and select the correct completion. This non-verbal reasoning task measures your ability to identify patterns, deduce rules, and apply logic. Used in intelligence testing to measure fluid intelligence and abstract reasoning ability.

audioAlphaDiver.title: Audio Alpha Diver
audioAlphaDiver.description: Dive into relaxation with immersive soundscapes! Listen to carefully designed audio that promotes alpha brain wave activity — the frequency associated with relaxed alertness. Close your eyes, breathe deeply, and let the sounds wash over you. Perfect for stress relief, meditation practice, or mental recovery after intense training.

stressSandbox.title: Stress Sandbox
stressSandbox.description: Release tension through tactile interaction! Engage with satisfying visual and tactile feedback — pop bubbles, squish shapes, or manipulate objects in a stress-free environment. This sandbox-style relaxation activity provides immediate sensory feedback that helps release physical tension and calm the mind. No goals, no pressure — just pure relaxation.

about.title: About CowB.cc
about.missionDescription: CowB.cc is dedicated to making science-based brain training accessible to everyone. We believe that cognitive health is a lifelong journey, and our mission is to help you understand and improve your brain's true potential.
about.technologyDescription: Built on modern web technology with a serverless architecture on Cloudflare's global edge network. We use evidence-based cognitive paradigms to deliver effective training.
about.scienceDescription: Our games are inspired by well-established cognitive paradigms including the Stroop test, digit span memory tasks, visual search experiments, and spatial memory research.
about.storyDescription: CowB.cc was created to bring lab-grade cognitive assessment to the browser. We combine rigorous science with delightful design to make brain training a daily habit.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how CowB.cc (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website and services.
privacy.dataWeCollectDescription: We collect the information you provide when creating an account, such as your email address and nickname, as well as gameplay data used to compute your brain age and progress.
privacy.howWeUseDescription: Your information is used to provide and improve our services, personalize your experience, analyze usage patterns, and communicate with you about your account.
privacy.dataSharingDescription: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share aggregated, non-identifiable data with analytics providers to understand how the service is used.
privacy.dataSecurityDescription: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including encryption in transit and at rest.
privacy.yourRightsDescription: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.cookiesDescription: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the site and analyze traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via the consent banner.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the CowB.cc website and services. By using our services, you agree to these terms.
terms.acceptanceDescription: By accessing or using CowB.cc, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.useOfServiceDescription: You agree to use CowB.cc only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others or restrict their use of the service.
terms.accountsDescription: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.intellectualPropertyDescription: All content on CowB.cc, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of CowB.cc or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.disclaimerDescription: CowB.cc provides brain training games for entertainment and educational purposes only. Our services are not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
terms.liabilityDescription: CowB.cc shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.changesDescription: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new Terms on this page.

brainAge.title: Brain Age Assessment
brainAge.subtitle: Measure your cognitive fitness across five core dimensions and discover your brain age — a single number that reflects how sharp your mind is today.
brainAge.dimensionsSectionSubtitle: Your brain age is computed from performance across the five pillars below. Each dimension is trained by dedicated games.
brainAge.processSubtitle: Three simple steps from play to insight.
brainAge.step1Desc: Train across the five dimensions. Every session contributes to your assessment.
brainAge.step2Desc: Your performance in each dimension is normalized into a 0–100 score.
brainAge.step3Desc: Scores are combined into a brain age, calibrated against your peer group.
brainAge.scienceBody: Brain age is a composite estimate of cognitive performance relative to a population baseline. It draws on decades of research showing that fluid intelligence, processing speed, and working memory change with age and respond to training. We combine your normalized dimension scores into a single, easy-to-track number.
brainAge.scienceCitation: Synthesized from cognitive aging research (Salthouse, 2009; Park et al., 2002).
brainAge.finalCtaSubtitle: Play a few games across each dimension to unlock your first brain age.

dimensionDescriptions.memory: Recall and retain information across short and long intervals.
dimensionDescriptions.attention: Sustain focus and filter out distractions.
dimensionDescriptions.reaction: Respond quickly and accurately to stimuli.
dimensionDescriptions.executive: Plan, switch tasks, and resolve conflicts.
dimensionDescriptions.relaxation: Regulate stress and settle the mind.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have improved their cognitive abilities

testimonial1.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial1.content: After 3 months of daily training, I noticed significant improvements in my focus and memory at work. The games are engaging and scientifically designed.

testimonial2.name: Michael Chen
testimonial2.content: CowB.cc helped me improve my study efficiency. My memory and concentration have gotten much better, and my grades have improved as a result.

testimonial3.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonial3.content: I recommend CowB.cc to my students. It's a fun and effective way to train the brain. The progress tracking feature is particularly helpful.

data.exportDescription: Download a copy of all your data in JSON format

data.clearGamesDescription: Remove all your game play history and scores. This action cannot be undone.
data.clearGamesConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to clear all your game records? This will remove all your play history, scores, and statistics. This action cannot be undone.
data.clearAllDescription: Remove all your data including profile, game records, and achievements. This action cannot be undone.
data.clearAllConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all your data including:
data.clearAllConfirmItems: Profile information,Game records and scores,Achievements and badges,All other account data
data.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
data.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This will:
data.deleteAccountConfirmItems: Permanently delete your account,Remove all your data,Cancel any active subscriptions,Remove access to all services
data.deleteAccountConfirmWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
